stage1_reason: Primary commit replaces alloc_disk() + blk_mq_init_queue() with blk_mq_alloc_disk() and put_disk() with blk_cleanup_disk() per kernel block layer API changes.
stage2_reason: Driver commit 6560explicitly replaces alloc_disk()+blk_mq_init_queue() with blk_mq_alloc_disk() and put_disk() with blk_cleanup_disk(), matching kernel API addition in b461dfc49eb6 (blk-mq: add the blk_mq_alloc_disk APIs) and f525464a8000 (block: add blk_alloc_disk and blk_cleanup_disk APIs). b461dfc49eb6 is chosen as the primary causal commit for the blk_mq_alloc_disk API introduction.
